changes.diff:
@@ -854,2 +854,3 @@
         'abstractmethod': directives.flag,
+        'classmethod': directives.flag,
         'type': directives.unchanged,
@@ -870,2 +871,4 @@
             prefix.insert(0, 'abstract')
+        if 'classmethod' in self.options:
+            prefix.insert(0, 'class')

@@ -2668,2 +2668,11 @@
 
+    def import_object(self, raiseerror: bool = False) -> bool:
+        ret = super().import_object(raiseerror)
+        if ret:
+            descriptor = self.get_attr(self.parent, '__dict__', {}).get(self.object_name)
+            if (inspect.isclassmethod(descriptor) and
+                    inspect.isproperty(descriptor.__func__)):
+                self.object = descriptor.__func__
+        return ret
+
     def get_real_modname(self) -> str:
@@ -2678,2 +2687,7 @@
 
+        descriptor = self.get_attr(self.parent, '__dict__', {}).get(self.object_name)
+        if (inspect.isclassmethod(descriptor) and
+                inspect.isproperty(descriptor.__func__)):
+            self.add_line('   :classmethod:', sourcename)
+
         if safe_getattr(self.object, 'fget', None) and self.config.autodoc_typehints != 'none':

@@ -19,4 +19,4 @@
 from sphinx.util import logging
-from sphinx.util.inspect import (getannotations, getmro, getslots, isclass, isenumclass,
-                                 safe_getattr)
+from sphinx.util.inspect import (getannotations, getmro, getslots, isclass, isclassmethod,
+                                 isenumclass, isproperty, safe_getattr)
 
@@ -277,2 +277,12 @@
             value = attrgetter(subject, name)
+            # ``classmethod(property(...))`` invokes the property when it is
+            # accessed through the class.  Use the wrapped descriptor here so
+            # autodoc can recognize and document it as a property.
+            for cls in getmro(subject):
+                descriptor = safe_getattr(cls, '__dict__', {}).get(name)
+                if descriptor is not None:
+                    if (isclassmethod(descriptor) and
+                            isproperty(descriptor.__func__)):
+                        value = descriptor.__func__
+                    break
             if ismock(value):
